feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Researcher specializing in Human-Computer Interaction, Virtual Reality, and Human-centered AI.

entry.title: Welcome to My Research Blog
entry.content:
Hello world! Welcome to my academic blog.

I will use this space to share my latest research updates, thoughts on designing intelligent co-creation systems, and explorations into the “Human-AI loop”.

Stay tuned for more updates on how intent capture and collaborative feedback can empower creators and enhance human agency!
entry.summary: Sharing my thoughts on Human-centered AI and immersive environments.
